case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. MARIPOUSA TAUFETEE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.99 SERVED NOV-08-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAUFETEE, MARIPOUSA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAUFETEE, MARIPOUSA $2,927.60 PRINCIPAL, $65.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,993.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,001.36 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT TAUFETEE, MARIPOUSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
